extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The time series starts relatively high (around 0.2–0.3) and then steadily decreases to a clear low plateau near zero during the first third of the time axis.  
R2: After this low plateau, the series rises sharply to a single broad peak in the middle part of the time axis, then gradually decreases toward the end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The time series starts very low (near zero), stays low or flat for the first third of the time axis, and then begins a gradual increase.  
R2: After this gradual increase, the series continues rising into one or more peaks in the later middle of the time axis, and remains relatively high (well above the early low values) for a longer duration before finally declining.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts at a relatively high value (around 0.2–0.3) and decreases toward near-zero within the first 5–7 time steps.  
R2: After this early dip, the series rises sharply to a single broad peak around time 12–15 and then slowly decays toward the end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts at a very low value (near zero) and stays low and flat for several initial time steps before noticeably increasing.  
R2: The main rise is more gradual, forming two smaller peaks or a stepped increase between times 10–20, rather than one sharp, dominant peak.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts at a relatively high value (around 0.2–0.3) and decreases to a clear minimum near zero within the first quarter of the time axis.  
R2: After that early minimum, the series rises sharply to its main peak around the middle of the time axis, then stays relatively high before gradually declining toward the end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts at a low value (near zero) and remains low and flat for a longer initial segment (about the first third of the time axis) before it begins to rise.  
R2: After this extended low region, the series then climbs to one or more peaks in the second half of the time axis and finally declines.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts at a relatively high value (around 0.2–0.35) and decreases to a clear low plateau close to 0 near time 4–6.
R2: After a steep rise peaking around time 12–14, the series stays high for several time steps (a broad, flat high region) before gradually declining.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts at a low value (around 0–0.1) and remains low or almost flat up to about time 6–7, then begins a gradual rise.
R2: After the main peak around time 12–14, the series shows a noticeable secondary bump or shoulder (a second local maximum) before declining.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first third of the series, values start moderately high (around 0.2–0.3) and then clearly dip close to 0 before rising again.
R2: After the midpoint (around index 10–12), values jump quickly to a high plateau (around 0.8–0.9) and stay high for several time steps before gradually decreasing.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first third of the series, values stay consistently very low (near 0) without an initial moderate peak.
R2: After the midpoint, values rise more gradually and form two distinct peaks (a first high peak, then a noticeable dip, then a second peak) rather than one broad high plateau.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts at a relatively high value (around 0.2–0.3) and decreases during the first third of the time, reaching a clear low plateau near zero.
R2: After this early dip, the series rises sharply around the middle of the time axis to a high peak (around 0.7–0.9), then stays high for a while before declining again toward the end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts at a very low value (close to zero) and stays low and flat during the first third of the time, without an initial high value or strong early decrease.
R2: From this low early level, the series then increases more gradually, reaching its main peak only in the middle/late part of the time axis, and then decreases toward the end.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: During the first 3–4 time steps, the series starts at a moderate value (around 0.2–0.3) and clearly decreases toward (or very close to) 0.  
R2: After this initial dip, the series rises steeply to a clear single main peak in the middle (around time 12–14), then stays relatively high and slowly decreases toward the end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: During the first 5–6 time steps, the series stays very low (near 0) with only small fluctuations, without any clear initial decrease from a higher value.  
R2: After this flat low start, the series increases more gradually, then forms its main peak later in time (after about step 14) before decreasing.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts at a relatively high value (around 0.2–0.3), then clearly decreases to a low near-zero value within the first third of the time.
R2: After this early dip, the series rises steeply to a single broad peak (around 0.6–0.9) in the middle portion, then gradually decreases toward the end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts at a very low value (near zero) and stays low and flat in the first third of the time, without an initial high followed by a drop.
R2: After this flat low start, the series increases more gradually in a ramp-like fashion toward a peak in the middle-to-late portion, then decreases toward the end.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts relatively high and clearly decreases during the first third of the time (early downward trend).
R2: After this early decrease, the series rises to a single main peak in the middle and then decreases smoothly toward the end without another strong late peak.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts low and stays low or flat during the first third of the time, without an early high followed by a drop.
R2: The series then rises and reaches its main peak in the later part of the time, so that the highest values occur closer to the end than to the beginning.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts relatively high (around 0.2–0.3) and clearly decreases toward a low plateau near 0 around time index 4–6.  
R2: After this early low plateau, the series rises sharply to a single dominant peak around time index 12–14, then smoothly decreases toward the end without any equally large later peak.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts very low (near 0) and stays low and flat for the first several time steps (up to around index 5–7), without an early local maximum.  
R2: From this low start, the series then increases more gradually and continues to climb so that its largest peak occurs later (around index 18–22), with earlier peaks being clearly smaller than this final one.
